appTitleHint: Shown in the header next to the logo
deleteProfileConfirm: Delete {{name}}? All data will be lost.
localPreferencesHint: Clears cached UI state: theme, sidebar, dismissed banners, advisor chat history, and other browser-local preferences. Server data is not affected.
clearLocalPreferencesConfirm: Clear all local preferences and reload?
soulMdHint: Defines the advisor personality, tone, and behavioral guidelines.
userMdHint: Personal context about the user (role, preferences, working style) that the advisor uses for tailored responses.
urlAllowlistHint: Domains the advisor and cron jobs may fetch. Requests to unlisted domains require user approval.
skillsHint: Reusable prompt templates applied automatically when the user's request matches. The advisor can also create skills via tool call.
cloudApiKeysHint: Billed per token. Set keys only for the providers you want to use.
webSearchHint: Used by the advisor's web_search tool. Priority: Brave > Tavily > DuckDuckGo (free fallback).
modelsAvailable: {{count}} model(s) available -- type to filter or enter any model string.
kaishoAiActiveHint: The advisor and cron jobs use OpenRouter via your Cloud Sync subscription. Local model settings below are not used while Kaisho AI is enabled.
localHint: No API key needed. Ollama and LM Studio run locally.
patHint: A Personal Access Token (PAT) is a GitHub credential that grants API access without a password.
tokenStorageHint: Token is stored in settings.yaml. It is never sent to the browser in full.
useKaishoAiHint: Route advisor and cron jobs through OpenRouter instead of local models. Requires Sync + AI plan.
apiKeyHint: Enter the API key from your confirmation email.
unlockCloudSync: Unlock Cloud Sync, Mobile App & AI
unlockCloudSyncHint: Connect your Kaisho instance to the cloud to sync time entries with the mobile app, enable the AI advisor and cron jobs without a local model, and access your data from anywhere.
cloudSyncFeature: Cloud Sync -- real-time bidirectional sync of clock entries
mobileAppFeature: Mobile App -- start and stop timers from your phone
kaishoAiFeature: Kaisho AI -- AI advisor and automated cron jobs without local GPU
spamFolderHint: After signing up, check your spam folder for the confirmation email. Some providers may flag it initially.
cloudSyncOptionalHint: Cloud sync is optional. The app works fully standalone without a cloud connection.
retentionHint: Older backups are removed automatically after each run. Set to 0 to keep every archive (no pruning).
backupsHint: Backups contain profile data only (settings, tasks, clock entries, knowledge base files inside the profile directory). Files stored in external paths are not included and must be backed up separately.
shortcutsHint: Shortcuts fire when no text field is focused. Click a shortcut to reassign it by pressing any key.
dataNotMigrated: Data is not migrated between backends.
importDataHint: Import data from another backend into the current profile. Import is additive -- clear existing data files first to avoid duplicates.
noKbSources: No KB sources defined. Add one below.
label: Label
pathsHint: Backend and data directories are stored per profile. DATA_DIR, HOST, PORT are global (.env).
exportHint: Configure which columns appear in CSV and Excel exports. Drag to reorder. The same layout applies to both the Clock view and Invoice panel exports.
browserModeHint: Running in browser mode. Download the desktop app for automatic updates.
noGithubTokenHint: Add a GitHub personal access token in Settings > GitHub to see your issues and projects here.
noAiProviderCronHint: Cron jobs need a local model (Ollama, LM Studio) or a cloud API key to run. Configure one in Settings > AI, or enable Kaisho AI via Settings > Cloud Sync.
